name: Peach Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Fresh peaches, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the fresh peaches, applesauce, apple juice concentrate, molasses, cinnamon, cardamom, nutmeg, and salt.
3. Add the oats, bread flour, yeast, and dried peaches to the fruit mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with butter or cooking spray.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
